Hero.heroBgAlt: Close-up of dark roasted coffee beans with warm dramatic lighting

StorySection.headline:
From Earth to
Essence.
StorySection.body: Every bean tells a story of the soil it left behind. We respect that narrative by mastering the alchemy of the grind, extracting the hidden notes of cherry, chocolate, and smoke that define our signature artisanal profile.
StorySection.imageAlt: Vintage hand-crank coffee grinder with ground coffee on dark wooden surface

MenuSection.headline: A Refined Collection of Specialty Brews.
MenuSection.menuImageAlt: Pour-over coffee being brewed with elegant steam rising
MenuSection.pullQuote: The best coffee is the one that tastes like a memory.

LocationSection.headline: Visit the Sanctuary.
LocationSection.locationImageAlt: Perfect porcelain cup of latte with leaf latte art on dark marble cafe table

obsidian-drip.name: The Obsidian Drip
obsidian-drip.description: Our flagship pour-over. Ethiopian single-origin beans with distinct notes of bergamot and jasmine.

oat-cortado.name: Oat Milk Cortado
oat-cortado.description: A perfect 1:1 ratio of silky steamed oat milk and a double shot of our espresso blend.

truffle-latte.name: Smoked Truffle Latte
truffle-latte.description: A daring fusion of dark chocolate, smoked hickory salt, and a hint of white truffle oil.

artisanal-toast.name: Artisanal Toast
artisanal-toast.description: Thick-cut brioche topped with whipped honey ricotta and roasted seasonal figs.

tasting-flight.name: The Tasting Flight
tasting-flight.description: Experience the full spectrum of our roasting profiles. A curated trio of our rarest seasonal harvests served in crystal glassware.

Metadata.title: Oinky Coffee
Metadata.description: Where ritual meets roast. A coffeeshop built on transformation. Est. 2024 — The Modern Alchemist.
